projects.name: GRDN
projects.note: Real exit-65 cause identified from the build log: the rive_native plugin's compiled static library (librive_native.a) isn't being produced on Xcode Cloud, so xcodebuild archive can't find it. It's a CI/build-config problem, not a code bug. Claude is fixing it now — tracing how rive_native builds its native lib and patching the CI build (likely a ci_post_clone.sh step or a version pin).
projects.nextStep: Fix in progress. Once pushed, Jeremy re-runs the Xcode Cloud build.

projects.name: SCANDALS
projects.note: v1.6.2 (commit 22dd86d) — fixed the wrong default: the app measured against A4, but you're on US Letter paper. Default is now US Letter and the Settings paper-size control spells out the choice. Past A4 scans over-read length ~6% (the 306mm scan corrects to ~288mm). Still open: paper *detection* itself is unstable (a 185-vs-274mm swing) — that's a capture problem, not a code default.
projects.nextStep: Decide on the capture change: use a reference sheet clearly bigger than the foot with all four corners visible, or place the paper BESIDE the foot (both flat on the floor). Claude makes the code change once you pick.

projects.name: HD-LOVE
projects.note: Launch-polish done: demo screen replaced, toggle moved into a real Settings screen, matching reframed into Romantic/Friends/Networking tabs with tagged matches. UX review: the experience is built; real go-live still needs auth, photo upload, and a live candidate feed.
projects.nextStep: Decide whether Claude takes on the go-live backend next: authentication, photo upload, and a live candidate feed.

projects.name: irons-design

projects.name: WEATHER
projects.note: App Store rejection (ITMS-90129) fixed; Mirror exercise now has a close button on every step. Code-complete at v1.3.0.
projects.nextStep: Confirm build 22 reached TestFlight and resubmit to App Store review.

projects.name: POSTURE
projects.note: Auto-capture (hands-free 4-view camera) shipped. Supabase keep-alive is running green — the project won't auto-pause anymore.
projects.nextStep: Smoke-test the auto-capture flow in Expo Go on your iPhone.

projects.name: PRIMAL
projects.note: 'Primal Moves' fitness-studio app — front-end mostly built; the Firebase + Stripe Cloud Functions backend is now built and pushed.
projects.nextStep: To deploy the backend: set the Firebase project id and Stripe secrets (Claude will hand you the checklist).

projects.name: AI Voice Agent
projects.note: Repo live on GitHub (giddyuptiger/primal-agent), auto-push wired. Dashboard complete and verified — full spec section 11 (unified inbox, live view, escalations queue, tickets, KB editor, metrics, auth); typecheck clean, 31/31 tests pass, boots in mock mode (commit 3c240c5). Claude is now building the last two unblocked pieces: the outbound campaign engine (build-order step 11) and an interactive voice test harness so the agent is demoable before Twilio is live.
projects.nextStep: Build in progress. Jeremy: kick off the Twilio A2P 10DLC registration now — carrier approval is the slowest step. See docs/PROVISIONING.md.
